shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -300
find dst -maxdepth 4 -type f | sed 's#^#/#' | sort && find . -maxdepth 4 -type d | sort

SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar > /tmp/hello-api.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; sleep 8; echo PID:$pid; printf '
ROOT:
'; curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/'; printf '
NAMED:
'; curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=%20%20Alice%20%20'; kill $pid; wait $pid || true; printf '
LOG:
'; tail -50 /tmp/hello-api.log
